title: Smoky Chicken Pilaf
description: A flavorful Indian-inspired dish featuring chicken and smoky spices, served with a side of pilaf.
instructions: Heat oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat.
Add the chicken and cook until browned, about 5 minutes.
Remove the chicken from the skillet and set aside.
Add the onion and ginger to the skillet and cook until the onion is translucent, about 3 minutes.
Add the malagueta peppers and cook for an additional minute.
Add the pilaf rice to the skillet and cook for 1-2 minutes, stirring constantly.
Return the chicken to the skillet and stir in the garam masala and smoky paprika.
Add the water to the skillet and bring to a boil.
Reduce the heat to low, cover the skillet, and simmer for 15-20 minutes, or until the chicken is cooked through and the liquid has been absorbed.
Fluff the pilaf with a fork and season with salt to taste.
Serve hot, garnished with chopped cilantro if desired.
